category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a tool to back up Bitbucket, GitHub, GitLab, and Forgejo repositories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as gitbackup.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies repository backup across Git hosting services; source_facts.executables shows a CLI executable.
